title: THEY ARE OUR SPIRIT (HOLY SPIRIT IN SHEKINAIH) OF TRUTH (JESUS, THE WORD, THE TRUTH IN AARON K DAVID) DWELLED IN AND OPERATING THROUGH THEM, WHOM WE HAVE SENT TO CONVICT THE WORLD OF SIN, OF JUDGEMENT AND OF RIGHTEOUSNESS!

paragraphs.text: THEY ARE OUR SPIRIT (HOLY SPIRIT IN SHEKINAIH) OF TRUTH (JESUS, THE WORD, THE TRUTH IN AARON K DAVID) DWELLED IN AND OPERATING THROUGH THEM, WHOM WE HAVE SENT TO CONVICT THE WORLD OF SIN, OF JUDGEMENT AND OF RIGHTEOUSNESS!

JOHN 16: 1 THESE THINGS HAVE I SPOKEN UNTO YOU, THAT YE SHOULD NOT BE OFFENDED. JOHN 16:2 THEY SHALL PUT YOU OUT OF THE SYNAGOGUES: YEA, THE TIME COMETH, THAT WHOSOEVER KILLETH YOU WILL THINK THAT HE DOETH GOD SERVICE.JOHN 16:3 AND THESE THINGS WILL THEY DO UNTO YOU, BECAUSE THEY HAVE NOT KNOWN THE FATHER, NOR ME.JOHN 16:4 BUT THESE THINGS HAVE I TOLD YOU, THAT WHEN THE TIME SHALL COME, YE MAY REMEMBER THAT I TOLD YOU OF THEM. AND THESE THINGS I SAID NOT UNTO YOU AT THE BEGINNING, BECAUSE I WAS WITH YOU. JOHN 16:5 BUT NOW I GO MY WAY TO HIM THAT SENT ME; AND NONE OF YOU ASKETH ME, WHITHER GOEST THOU? JOHN 16:6 BUT BECAUSE I HAVE SAID THESE THINGS UNTO YOU, SORROW HATH FILLED YOUR HEART. JOHN 16:7 NEVERTHELESS I TELL YOU THE TRUTH; IT IS EXPEDIENT FOR YOU THAT I GO AWAY: FOR IF I GO NOT AWAY, THE COMFORTER WILL NOT COME UNTO YOU; BUT IF I DEPART, I WILL SEND HIM UNTO YOU. JOHN 16:8 AND WHEN HE IS COME, HE WILL REPROVE THE WORLD OF SIN, AND OF RIGHTEOUSNESS, AND OF JUDGMENT: JOHN 16:9 OF SIN, BECAUSE THEY BELIEVE NOT ON ME;(THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AND SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID IN THESE LAST DAYS). JOHN 16:10 OF RIGHTEOUSNESS, BECAUSE I GO TO MY FATHER, AND YE SEE ME NO MORE; (THE RIGHTEOUS SHALL ALSO LIVE BY FAITH, FROM TESTING TO TESTING, FROM FAITH TO FATIH AND FROM GLORY TO GLORY IN CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL) IN THESE LAST DAYS). JOHN 16:11 OF JUDGMENT, BECAUSE THE PRINCE OF THIS WORLD IS JUDGED.(THE SPIRIT OF TRUTH THROUGH THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND JESUS THAT IS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID WERE SENT TO WARN OF THE COMING IMPENDING JUDGEMENT EXECUTING FROM JESUS POINT TOWARDS THE ENTIRE BOOK OF REVELATION ON THE LAST DAYS EVENTS). JOHN 16:12 I HAVE YET MANY THINGS TO SAY UNTO YOU, BUT YE CANNOT BEAR THEM NOW. JOHN 16:13 HOWBEIT WHEN HE, THE SPIRIT OF TRUTH, IS COME, HE WILL GUIDE YOU INTO ALL TRUTH: FOR HE SHALL NOT SPEAK OF HIMSELF; BUT WHATSOEVER HE SHALL HEAR, THAT SHALL HE SPEAK: AND HE WILL SHEW YOU THINGS TO COME. JOHN 16:14 HE SHALL GLORIFY ME: FOR HE SHALL RECEIVE OF MINE, AND SHALL SHEW IT UNTO YOU. JOHN 16:15 ALL THINGS THAT THE FATHER HATH ARE MINE: THEREFORE SAID I, THAT HE SHALL TAKE OF MINE, AND SHALL SHEW IT UNTO YOU. JOHN 16:16 A LITTLE WHILE, AND YE SHALL NOT SEE ME: AND AGAIN, A LITTLE WHILE, AND YE SHALL SEE ME (IN THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND IN JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID), BECAUSE I GO TO THE FATHER.
